title: Lapis Loot
description: This Project Adds Lapis Gear That Has Really Good Enchants, But Only Has Durability And Stats Of Iron Gear
body:
Lapis Loot Adds 4 New Armour Pieces (Lapis Helmet, Lapis Chestplate, Lapis Leggings and Lapis Boots). It Also Adds Five New Tools (Lapis Pickaxe, Lapis Sword, Lapis Hoe, Lapis Shovel And Lapis Axe). All Of The Gear Is Iron Level And Has Really Good Enchantability

Available For:
Forge 1.20.1
NeoForge 1.21.1
